# Client MCP Server

This is the Model Context Protocol server for this client. It is the **only** component that knows this client's CRM API — all agent modules talk to the CRM exclusively through MCP tools.

**Generated by:** `.claude/agents/build-mcp.md`  
**Language:** TypeScript | **Base:** `packages/mcp-base`  
**Docker image:** `registry.storageidol.com/mcp-<client-id>:<version>`

## Structure

```
mcp/
├── index.ts          # Server entry point, registers all tools
├── Dockerfile
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── tools/
│   ├── auth.ts       # Identity validation against client CRM
│   ├── contracts.ts  # Contract and unit information
│   ├── invoices.ts   # Invoice history and payment links
│   ├── debt.ts       # Debt case management
│   └── crm.ts        # Write-back: post interaction summary to CRM
└── tests/
    ├── auth.test.ts
    ├── contracts.test.ts
    ├── invoices.test.ts
    ├── debt.test.ts
    └── crm.test.ts
```

## Rules

- Never import from `core/` or other `clients/`
- Never log request payloads that contain PII
- Every tool returns `null` or `[]` on error — never throws to the agent
- Authentication is always validated before returning any client data

## Local development

```bash
npm install
npm run dev        # Starts MCP server on port 3100
npm test           # Run all tool tests
npm run build      # Compile TypeScript
```
